name: Prawns with Crab Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the stuffing ingredients (margarine, flour, green onion, garlic, salt, and pepper). Reserve 1/4 cup of margarine for later use. Refrigerate.
2. Clean the shrimp by making a shallow cut lengthwise down the back.
3. Place the shrimp in a greased baking dish with the cut side up.
4. Stuff each shrimp with the stuffing mixture and brush with the reserved margarine.
5. Bake at 350°F for 12-20 minutes, depending on the size of the shrimp.
Sauce:
1. In a saucepan, melt margarine over medium heat. Stir in flour until smooth.
2. Gradually add evaporated milk, stirring constantly to avoid lumps. Cook until the mixture begins to thicken.
3. Add cheese, Heinz 57 sauce, and salt. Stir until well combined.
4. Remove from heat and stir in crab meat.
5. Serve the crab sauce over the baked shrimp.
